title: Debate Rhetoric
description: Opening, rebuttal, and closing statements in formal debate.
summary_pt_br: Retórica de debate: abertura formal, refutação estruturada, fechamento com resumo.

scenes.subtitle_en: Opening, rebuttal, and closing statements in formal debate.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Retórica de debate: abertura formal, refutação estruturada, fechamento com resumo.

scenes.text_en: Opening, rebuttal, and closing statements in formal debate. Today's focus: debate rhetoric. The motion before us is that technology hinders intimacy.
scenes.text_pt: Retórica de debate: abertura formal, refutação estruturada, fechamento com resumo. Foco de hoje: debate rhetoric. A moção diante de nós é que a tecnologia prejudica a intimidade.

scenes.title: Debate Rhetoric
scenes.body_en: Opening: 'The motion before us is...' Rebuttal: 'I'd like to address three claims made by the opposition.' Closing: 'In summary, the evidence supports...'
scenes.body_pt: Retórica de debate: abertura formal, refutação estruturada, fechamento com resumo.

examples.en: The motion before us is that technology hinders intimacy.
examples.pt: A moção diante de nós é que a tecnologia prejudica a intimidade.

examples.en: I would like to address three claims made by the opposition.
examples.pt: Gostaria de abordar três afirmações da oposição.

examples.en: In summary, the evidence overwhelmingly supports our side.
examples.pt: Em resumo, a evidência apoia nosso lado.

exercise.question: Complete: "The motion before us is that ___ hinders intimacy."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "The motion before us is that technology hinders intimacy."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A moção diante de nós é que a tecnologia prejudica a intimidade.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
I would like to address three claims made by the opposition.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "I would like to address three claims made by the opposition."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Gostaria de abordar três afirmações da oposição.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Debate Rhetoric — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre debate rhetoric. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Open a debate on screen time limits for teens.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The motion is that strict screen limits harm teens.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: First, excessive limits reduce digital literacy.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Rebut this: 'screens cause anxiety in 70% of teens.'

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I'd like to address that figure with two studies.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Concede something small to sound fair.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The opposition is right about sleep disruption.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Now close with a strong summary.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: In summary, balance beats prohibition every time.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Formal, fair, and firm — that's rhetoric.

scenes.title: The university debate
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe the motion, the rebuttal, and the closing. Use at least three debate phrases.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the university auditorium, two teams faced off over the most contested question of their year.

paragraphs.speaker: Speaker A
paragraphs.en: The motion before us tonight is that technology strengthens, not weakens, human intimacy.

paragraphs.speaker: Speaker B
paragraphs.en: I would like to address three claims made by the affirmative team, starting with their first.

paragraphs.speaker: Speaker A
paragraphs.en: We concede that asynchronous messaging can erode attention — but it also extends reach.

paragraphs.speaker: Speaker B
paragraphs.en: In summary, the evidence demonstrates that depth and speed are rarely served by the same tool.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Rhetoric in a debate, the moderator noted, is the quiet promise that two sides can both win the room.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Debate Rhetoric". Opening, rebuttal, and closing statements in formal debate. The motion before us is that technology hinders intimacy. I would like to address three claims made by the opposition. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Debate Rhetoric". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
